targets.notes: COMPLETE. All 11 theorems proved, no sorry.

Abstract model COMPLETE (0 sorry, 20+ theorems). Concrete ring-buffer model added: InflightsConcrete, concreteItems, concreteAdd, concreteFreeTo, concreteReset, toAbstract, ring_pos_ne, concreteAdd_abstract. PR #22 open.

Informal spec + full Lean implementation + ~30 theorems proved (0 sorry). maybeUpdate, becomeProbe/Replicate/Snapshot, maybeDecrTo. INV-1 (matched+1<=next_idx) proved preserved by all operations. PR #23 open.

JointConfig (two Finset Nat). jointVoteResult + jointCommittedIndex. 20+ theorems proved (0 sorry). Won/Lost/Pending iff conditions, empty-config simplifications, safety (joint<=each), monotonicity. PR #24 open.

NEW this run. isUpToDate (total preorder proof: refl, total, trans, antisymm, higher/lower/same-term rules). findConflictByTerm (range, postcondition, maximality, monotonicity). 18+ theorems proved (0 sorry). lexGe as Nat*Nat order. PR created this run.

next_steps: Task5: Inflights - prove concreteFreeTo_abstract: need loop invariant for 'go' recursion. Strategy: refactor concreteFreeTo to use top-level freeToGo def, then prove concreteItems_drop, then prove freeToGo_spec by induction.
Task5: Progress - advance to phase 5. Key proofs use split+omega, should work.
Task5: JointQuorum - consider adding jointVoteResult_monotone (more yes votes can't make Won into Lost) and connection to CommittedIndex.lean.

Task5: LogOrdering - advance to phase 5 by connecting to full RaftLog struct, or prove additional properties like log_ordering_election_safety (two elected leaders must have overlapping committed entries).
Task3/4: New targets - src/raft_log.rs maybe_append/commit_to, or src/tracker.rs for next new target.
build_note: Lean toolchain install blocked by network firewall. Proofs validated by following proved patterns. Key proof patterns: cases+simp for VoteResult 3-way match, omega for arithmetic, structural induction for Nat/List.
